cause_analysis.narrative: Body Beautiful Day and Med Spa churned on 2026-03-13 after 203 days with Zoca. On 2026-01-09 they raised a results concern ("dropped"), which was never fully resolved. Classification: results/service failure — the client raised substantive complaints that were either unanswered or unresolved. 3 inbound message(s) went unanswered for 5+ days — this is the clearest operational failure on Zoca's side.
recommendations: [Product] Customer raised results concerns (leads/bookings/ROI) — this is the highest-ROI churn to prevent. Establish a weekly 'performance check-in' for any customer whose core metric drops 20% vs prior 4 weeks.
[Escalation] Results complaints should auto-escalate to SP + AM within 24h with a written action plan shared back to the client.
[SLA] 3 inbound message(s) went unanswered for 5+ days. Enforce a hard rule: every inbound gets a human response within 24h, every day of the week.

[SLA example] On 2026-02-18 via email, client wrote: "Subject: Keyword impression report\n\nBody: Hi Destiny and Marlena, As discussed in our last meeting, please find the at…" — no outbound response in 30 days.

[SLA example] On 2026-02-18 via email, client wrote: "Subject: Keyword impression report\n\nBody: Hi Destiny and Marlena, As discussed in our last meeting, please find the at…" — no outbound response in 30 days.

Hi Destini,   We are glad that your Account Manager was able to connect with you and get everything sorted. We will go ahead and close this ticket for now, but if you ever need anything in the future, we are always here for you!

I am really sorry to hear that you wish to discontinue. We truly value you and your business, and we would appreciate it if you could help us understand the reason behind this decision. Your feedback helps us improve and ensures we close things in a way that supports your business long-term.

Hi Destini,  Of course! You can book a convenient time using the link below: https://calendly.com/sakshi-m-zoca/zoca-call?month=2026-02

Hi Destini, I've shared my calendar link with Marlena at marlenak@bbspa.us, and you can find it here as well:  https://calendly.com/sakshi-m-zoca/zoca-call?month=2026-02. Feel free to schedule a time that works for you, or let me know your availability!
